creator: makeconfig@gmail.com
text:
When trying to configure Quagga with OSPF found that the daemon receives
multicast packets only when I'm running tcpdump on the interface. Some
time ago found the issue like this in Linux kernel with rtl8169 and iSCSI,
upgrading the kernel helps to resolve that problem. Think this issue like
that is in age (Attansic L1 Gigabit Ethernet) driver but don't know how
to describe more detailed.
